name: shadow-jing-garden-4.2-sim
description: Headless, local-only party-game simulations for the fictional 18+ Shadow Jing Garden 4.2 sim. No network, no media, no external calls.

scripts.smoke: node simulations/run-4.2-game-simulation.js && node simulations/clock-test.js && node simulations/nyc-local-dev-simulator.js --requests=40 --seed=42 && node simulations/party-round.js --rounds=3 --seed=42
